description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hugomrdias/node-yarn:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules directory per branch using a cache key of ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}. Add a before_script that runs `node -v`, `yarn --version`, and installs dependencies with `yarn`. Define a single stage called test and a job named test in that stage that executes `yarn test`. No services, variables, artifacts, or special rules are required.
